name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "idle"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
            /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "trying"
            /\ turn = i
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
            /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ state[i] = "critical"
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
            /\ turn' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit

---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

Init ==
  /\ coordinator = "INIT"
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "INIT"]

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinator = "INIT"
      /\ coordinator' = "PREPARING"
      /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> Append(messages[i], "Prepare")]
      /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
      /\ \A i \in 1..N :
            /\ messages[i] = <<>>
            /\ participants[i] = "INIT"
            /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "PREPARED"]
            /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = <<>>]
  \/ /\ coordinator = "PREPARING"
      /\ \A i \in 1..N :
            /\ messages[i] = <<>>
            /\ participants[i] = "PREPARED"
            /\ participants' = participants
            /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![i] = <<>>]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Forks == {1, 2, ..., N}

(* States: a function from philosopher indices to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
States == [i \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ states = [i \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper: determine the left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Helper: check if philosopher i can eat (both adjacent forks are free) *)
CanEat(i) == LeftFork(i) \in forks /\ RightFork(i) \in forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks to eat *)
TakeForks(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
PutForks(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, or any philosopher who can eat picks up forks, or any philosopher who is eating puts down forks *)
Next == 
    \E i \in Forks : 
        (Hungry(i) \/ TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks, states is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \subseteq Forks
    /\ states \in [Forks -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num[i] is an integer and flag[i] is a boolean for all i *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have number 0 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next action: process i chooses a number and then enters critical section *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(num))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: blocks when full *)
Produce == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* Enqueue a dummy item *)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: blocks when empty *)
Consume == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  (* Dequeue *)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Produce \/ Consume

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
  /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = None
  /\ state = Follower

RequestVote(term, candidateId) ==
  /\ state = Follower
  /\ term >= currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = candidateId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

VoteGranted ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

Next ==
  \/ RequestVote
  \/ VoteGranted

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
